verses.text: 'O sing unto the LORD a new song,' showing His salvation day to day and declaring His glory among the nations. Praise is for all peoples. The mercies of God are meant to be proclaimed to the whole world.

'O sing unto the LORD a new song,' showing His salvation day to day and declaring His glory among the nations. Praise is for all peoples. The mercies of God are meant to be proclaimed to the whole world.

'O sing unto the LORD a new song,' showing His salvation day to day and declaring His glory among the nations. Praise is for all peoples. The mercies of God are meant to be proclaimed to the whole world.

The LORD is great and to be feared above all, for 'all the gods of the nations are idols: but the LORD made the heavens.' He alone is God. The Maker of all stands infinitely above the lifeless idols men invent.

The LORD is great and to be feared above all, for 'all the gods of the nations are idols: but the LORD made the heavens.' He alone is God. The Maker of all stands infinitely above the lifeless idols men invent.

The LORD is great and to be feared above all, for 'all the gods of the nations are idols: but the LORD made the heavens.' He alone is God. The Maker of all stands infinitely above the lifeless idols men invent.

Let all families ascribe glory and strength to the LORD and 'worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.' True worship is reverent and pure. The God of glory is to be honoured in holiness by every people.

Let all families ascribe glory and strength to the LORD and 'worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.' True worship is reverent and pure. The God of glory is to be honoured in holiness by every people.

Let all families ascribe glory and strength to the LORD and 'worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.' True worship is reverent and pure. The God of glory is to be honoured in holiness by every people.

Tell the nations, 'The LORD reigneth,' and let heaven and earth rejoice, for He comes 'to judge the world with righteousness.' His reign and coming judgment are good news. Creation itself will rejoice when the righteous King appears.
